## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Link the related issue: Closes #<issue-number> -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — Test additions or fixes
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `ci` — Pipeline / workflow changes
- [ ] `chore` — Dependency updates, config changes

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally

## Security Checklist
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII committed
- [ ] Input validation added for any new endpoints
- [ ] Dependencies audited (`npm audit`)
- [ ] No `console.log` with sensitive data

## Deployment Notes
<!-- Any environment config changes? Migration steps? Rollback considerations? -->

## Screenshots / Evidence
<!-- For UI changes or metric changes, include before/after screenshots -->

---
> **Pipeline Gates:** This PR must pass all required status checks before merge:
> static analysis, secret scanning, license validation, unit tests (≥80% coverage), and container security scan.
> GitHub Copilot is available in the IDE to help diagnose any failures.
